vineyards.name: E. Guigal
vineyards.classification: Cote-Rotie AOC, Condrieu AOC, Hermitage AOC, Cotes du Rhone AOC
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tastings at Chateau d'Ampuis by appointment
vineyards.description: Ampuis-based negociant and domaine celebrated for the single-vineyard Cote-Rotie La La La trilogy from old Syrah vines.
vineyards.tip: The La La La trilogy (La Mouline, La Landonne, La Turque) are allocated; the Chateau d'Ampuis Cote-Rotie is the most accessible flagship.

vineyards.name: M. Chapoutier
vineyards.address: 18 Avenue du Docteur Paul Durand, 26600 Tain-l'Hermitage, France
vineyards.classification: Hermitage AOC, Crozes-Hermitage AOC, Cotes du Rhone AOC
vineyards.tasting_program: Open tasting room in Tain-l'Hermitage; cellar tours by appointment
vineyards.description: Tain-l'Hermitage negociant under biodynamic conversion since the 1990s, producing benchmark Hermitage Syrah and rare Marsanne whites.
vineyards.tip: The Braille labels on all bottles reflect the family's commitment to accessibility. The tasting room in town is walk-in friendly.

verified.address_quoted: 18 Avenue du Docteur Paul Durand, 26600 Tain-l'Hermitage

vineyards.name: Paul Jaboulet Aine
vineyards.classification: Hermitage AOC, Crozes-Hermitage AOC, Cotes du Rhone AOC
vineyards.tasting_program: La Cave by appointment; wine shop open in Tain-l'Hermitage
vineyards.description: One of the Rhone's oldest negociants, producers of the iconic Hermitage La Chapelle Syrah from the hill's granite flanks in Tain.
vineyards.tip: La Chapelle from top vintages (1961, 1990, 2010) is among the most age-worthy wines in France.

vineyards.name: Domaine Jean-Louis Chave
vineyards.tasting_program: No public visits. Wines sold on allocation via importers.
vineyards.description: Mauves family domaine with Hermitage holdings tracing to the 15th century, producing assemblage Hermitage Syrah and Marsanne from multiple lieux-dits.
vineyards.tip: The Cuvee Cathelin is a single-vineyard rarity made only in exceptional vintages.

vineyards.name: Auguste Clape
vineyards.tasting_program: By appointment only at the family cellar in Cornas
vineyards.description: The reference producer of Cornas AOC, farming old Syrah vines on granite terraces. Pierre-Marie Clape continues Auguste's work on the village's most celebrated terroir.
vineyards.tip: Wines are frequently released later than other Cornas producers; patience rewards with extraordinary mineral concentration.

vineyards.name: Thierry Allemand
vineyards.tasting_program: No regular public visits. Allocation-only through importers.
vineyards.description: Cornas artisan with cult status, producing old-vine Syrah from Chaillot (younger vines) and Reynard (centenarian-vine parcel) with zero intervention.
vineyards.tip: Among the most sought-after and hardest-to-find bottles in the entire Rhone Valley.

vineyards.name: Vincent Paris
vineyards.tasting_program: By appointment at the domaine
vineyards.description: Rising star of Cornas farming granite terraces, producing age-worthy Syrah cuvees named after vine age: Granit 30 and Granit 60.
vineyards.tip: The Granit 60 from old vines is a benchmark for granite-terroir Cornas at a fraction of the price of Clape or Allemand.

vineyards.name: Domaine Jamet
vineyards.tasting_program: By appointment only at the domaine in Ampuis
vineyards.description: Benchmark Cote-Rotie domaine producing a single assemblage from multiple Cote Brune and Cote Blonde terraces, known for depth and finesse.
vineyards.tip: Jean-Paul and Jean-Luc Jamet blend all their lieux-dits into one estate Cote-Rotie that consistently ranks among the appellation's finest.

vineyards.name: Rene Rostaing
vineyards.address: 35 Route de la Cote, 69420 Ampuis, France
vineyards.tasting_program: By appointment at the domaine
vineyards.description: Ampuis domaine with parcels on La Landonne lieu-dit of the Cote Brune and the Cote Blonde, producing structured, terroir-expressive Cote-Rotie.
vineyards.tip: La Landonne is the most mineral and iron-tinged cuvee; La Vialliere is a more accessible early-drinker.

vineyards.name: Domaine Stephane Ogier
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings by appointment at the domaine in Ampuis
vineyards.description: Modern Cote-Rotie producer crafting single-vineyard cuvees from the Cote Brune and Blonde with precision viticulture.
vineyards.tip: The Belle Helene single-vine cuvee is among the most expressive Cote-Rotie bottlings of its generation.

vineyards.name: Domaine Bonnefond
vineyards.tasting_program: By appointment at the domaine
vineyards.description: Brothers Patrick and Christophe Bonnefond farm Cote-Rotie parcels on the Coteaux de Tupin, producing elegant, floral Syrah and classic Viognier.

vineyards.name: Pierre Gaillard
vineyards.classification: Cote-Rotie AOC, Saint-Joseph AOC, Condrieu AOC
vineyards.tasting_program: By appointment at the domaine
vineyards.description: Malleval domaine with vines across Cote-Rotie, Saint-Joseph and Condrieu, known for rich, concentrated Syrah with reliable terroir expression.

vineyards.name: Yves Cuilleron
vineyards.classification: Condrieu AOC, Saint-Joseph AOC, Cote-Rotie AOC
vineyards.tasting_program: Open tasting room in Chavanay; appointment recommended
vineyards.description: Leading Condrieu domaine producing multiple single-vineyard Viognier bottlings alongside Cote-Rotie and Saint-Joseph.
vineyards.tip: Les Chaillets is the classic cuvee; Vertige is from the highest-altitude vineyards.

vineyards.name: Georges Vernay
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting room in Condrieu; open Monday to Saturday, appointments preferred
vineyards.description: The domaine credited with saving Condrieu from near-extinction in the 1970s, now run by Christine Vernay with benchmark single-vineyard Viognier.
vineyards.tip: Coteau de Vernon is the top cuvee from the oldest vines and is the most age-worthy Viognier in the appellation.

vineyards.name: Andre Perret
vineyards.address: 17 Route de la Taquete, 42410 Chavanay, France
vineyards.tasting_program: By appointment at the domaine in Chavanay
vineyards.description: Chavanay domaine producing expressive Condrieu from the Coteau Chery lieu-dit, one of the appellation's most concentrated aromatic terroirs.

vineyards.name: Domaine Francois Villard
vineyards.address: 18 Petit Route de Romans, 42410 Saint-Michel-sur-Rhone, France
vineyards.classification: Condrieu AOC, Saint-Joseph AOC, Cote-Rotie AOC
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings by appointment at the domaine
vineyards.description: Saint-Michel-sur-Rhone domaine producing ambitious Northern Rhone whites and reds with low-intervention and site-specific focus.

vineyards.name: Domaine du Tunnel
vineyards.address: 20 Rue de la Republique, 07130 Saint-Peray, France
vineyards.tasting_program: By appointment at the cellar in Saint-Peray
vineyards.description: Saint-Peray specialist producing still and sparkling Marsanne alongside compelling Cornas from adjacent granite terraces.

vineyards.name: Domaine Combier
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting room open weekdays; Saturday by appointment
vineyards.description: Organic and biodynamic-practicing Crozes-Hermitage estate with the Clos des Grives single-vineyard Syrah as its standout red.
vineyards.tip: Among the most reliable value-for-quality bottlings in the Northern Rhone; biodynamic farming at accessible prices.

vineyards.name: Domaine Alain Graillot
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by appointment at the domaine
vineyards.description: Alain Graillot elevated the Crozes-Hermitage appellation's reputation for serious Syrah beginning in 1985; La Guiraude is the old-vine prestige cuvee.
vineyards.tip: The straightforward Crozes rouge is one of the best value reds in the Northern Rhone.

vineyards.name: Domaine Belle
vineyards.tasting_program: By appointment at the domaine in Larnage
vineyards.description: Larnage Crozes-Hermitage estate with parcels on the Hermitage hill, known for purity of fruit and mineral expression.

vineyards.name: Domaine Gonon
vineyards.tasting_program: By appointment only at the estate in Mauves
vineyards.description: Mauves reference estate for Saint-Joseph, run by brothers Pierre and Jean Gonon on old-vine granite parcels; one of the most elegant Saint-Josephs made.
vineyards.tip: Wines sell out quickly. The Saint-Joseph blanc from Marsanne and Roussanne is a rare and beautiful white.

vineyards.name: Domaine Faury
vineyards.tasting_program: By appointment at the domaine
vineyards.description: Chavanay family domaine across Condrieu and Saint-Joseph, producing clean, precise Viognier and Syrah with organic farming.

vineyards.name: Domaine des Lises (Maxime Graillot)
vineyards.tasting_program: By appointment at the domaine
vineyards.description: Maxime Graillot's own domaine in Mercurol. Old-vine Crozes-Hermitage parcels farmed organically with a site-specific focus.
vineyards.tip: A producer to follow; each vintage shows increasing terroir precision and elegance.

vineyards.name: Chateau de Beaucastel
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tastings by appointment at the estate; wine shop on site
vineyards.description: The Perrin family estate at Courthezon, one of the oldest and most biologically farmed CdP properties, using all 13 permitted varieties and producing the benchmark Roussanne Vieilles Vignes blanc.
vineyards.tip: The Hommage a Jacques Perrin is the prestige red; the Roussanne Vieilles Vignes white is the estate's flagship white wine.

vineyards.name: Chateau Rayas
vineyards.tasting_program: No public visits. Wines available by allocation through importers.
vineyards.description: The most celebrated estate in Chateauneuf-du-Pape, producing pure old-vine Grenache from shaded, sandy soils with extraordinary longevity.
vineyards.tip: Emmanuel Reynaud also produces Chateau des Tours Vacqueyras and the Pignan second label; Rayas is extremely rare.

vineyards.name: Domaine du Vieux Telegraphe
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting room open Monday to Friday; appointment for groups
vineyards.description: The Brunier family estate on the La Crau plateau, one of Chateauneuf-du-Pape's most consistent properties, farming the stony galets roulees terrain.
vineyards.tip: The La Crau plateau stones absorb heat and radiate it at night, defining the opulent fruit of Vieux Telegraphe.

vineyards.name: Clos des Papes
vineyards.address: 13 Avenue Saint-Pierre de Luxembourg, 84230 Chateauneuf-du-Pape, France
vineyards.tasting_program: By appointment at the estate in Chateauneuf-du-Pape
vineyards.description: Paul-Vincent Avril's family estate, one of Chateauneuf-du-Pape's most consistent producers, making densely structured reds from a large parcel mosaic.
vineyards.tip: The red uses Mourvedre more generously than most CdP estates, lending dark-earth, game-meat character.

vineyards.name: Domaine du Pegau
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings by appointment at the estate
vineyards.description: The Feraud family domaine producing Chateauneuf-du-Pape of extraordinary concentration and longevity, particularly the special-edition Da Capo cuvee.

vineyards.name: Domaine de la Janasse
vineyards.classification: Chateauneuf-du-Pape AOC, Cotes du Rhone AOC
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting room open Monday to Saturday at the domaine
vineyards.description: Courthezon family estate producing approachable and reliably excellent Chateauneuf-du-Pape including the old-vine Chaupin Grenache cuvee.
vineyards.tip: Cuvee Chaupin from a single old-vine Grenache parcel is a must-try.

vineyards.name: Domaine Charvin
vineyards.classification: Chateauneuf-du-Pape AOC, Cotes du Rhone AOC
vineyards.tasting_program: By appointment at the domaine near Orange
vineyards.description: Laurent Charvin's estate on the northern edge of Chateauneuf-du-Pape produces a single estate red of unusual elegance and purity, prized for finesse over power.

vineyards.name: Clos Saint-Jean
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings by appointment at the estate
vineyards.description: Chateauneuf-du-Pape estate run by brothers Pascal and Vincent Maurel, producing concentrated cuvees including the rare Deus ex Machina prestige bottling.

vineyards.name: Domaine de Marcoux
vineyards.tasting_program: By appointment at the domaine
vineyards.description: Demeter-certified biodynamic Chateauneuf-du-Pape estate producing profound old-vine Grenache of great depth and terroir expression.
vineyards.tip: The Vieilles Vignes cuvee from centenarian Grenache is among the most complex and age-worthy in CdP.

vineyards.name: Le Vieux Donjon
vineyards.tasting_program: By appointment at the estate in Chateauneuf-du-Pape
vineyards.description: One of CdP's most traditional domaines, the Michel family producing classically-structured Grenache-dominant reds of great consistency.

vineyards.name: Domaine de la Mordoree
vineyards.classification: Tavel AOC, Lirac AOC, Chateauneuf-du-Pape AOC
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting room open at the domaine in Tavel; appointment preferred
vineyards.description: Tavel domaine producing the reference rose of the appellation, the Dame Rousse, alongside Lirac red and white and a Chateauneuf-du-Pape.
vineyards.tip: La Dame Rousse is the reference Tavel rose; structured enough to age 3-5 years.

vineyards.name: Domaine Santa Duc
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting room open at the domaine in Gigondas
vineyards.description: Historic Gigondas estate with old-vine parcels across the Dentelles de Montmirail producing structured, spice-laden reds.
vineyards.tip: Aux Relagnes is the classic Gigondas cuvee; Hautes Garrigues is the prestige single-vineyard bottling.

vineyards.name: Domaine Raspail-Ay
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting room at the domaine; open weekdays
vineyards.description: One of Gigondas's most respected traditional estates, producing Grenache-dominant reds from old vines on clay-limestone slopes.

vineyards.name: Chateau de Saint Cosme
vineyards.address: Route du Chateau de Saint-Cosme, 84190 Gigondas, France
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting room open at the chateau; appointment recommended
vineyards.description: Gigondas estate with recorded winemaking history to the 15th century, run by Louis Barruol as both domaine and Southern Rhone negociant.
vineyards.tip: The estate occupies the hillside above the village with Roman-era cellars carved from the rock.

verified.address_quoted: Route du Chateau de Saint-Cosme, 84190 Gigondas

vineyards.name: Domaine La Soumade
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting room open at the domaine in Rasteau
vineyards.description: Rasteau family domaine producing both the dry appellation red and the traditional Rasteau vin doux naturel (VDN), one of the few maintaining this fortified wine tradition.
vineyards.tip: The Rasteau VDN is a fortified Grenache in Rancio style; a disappearing tradition well worth seeking out.

vineyards.name: Domaine Gourt de Mautens
vineyards.tasting_program: By appointment at the domaine
vineyards.description: The cult producer of Rasteau, deliberately declassifying wines to IGP Vaucluse, farming rare old vine field blends including obscure varieties like Camarese for extraordinary complexity.
vineyards.tip: Production is tiny; wines are sought by collectors globally. One of the great value-to-quality stories in the Southern Rhone.

vineyards.name: Domaine Brusset
vineyards.tasting_program: Open tasting room at the domaine in Cairanne
vineyards.description: Cairanne and Gigondas producer with a large portfolio, a reference estate for the newly elevated Cairanne AOC.

vineyards.name: Domaine de la Presidente
vineyards.classification: Cairanne AOC, Cotes du Rhone Villages AOC
vineyards.tasting_program: Open tasting room; Monday to Saturday
vineyards.description: Long-established Cairanne estate well-known for the Grande Garde cuvee from old vines across multiple appellations.

vineyards.name: Tardieu-Laurent
vineyards.address: Les Grandes Bastides, Route de Cucuron, 84160 Lourmarin, France
vineyards.classification: Chateauneuf-du-Pape AOC, Gigondas AOC, Hermitage AOC, Cote-Rotie AOC
vineyards.tasting_program: By appointment; offices in Lourmarin
vineyards.description: Negociant house sourcing old-vine Rhone fruit across both north and south for barrel-aged cuvees of concentration and depth.

verified.address_quoted: Les Grandes Bastides, Route de Cucuron, 84160 Lourmarin

vineyards.name: Famille Perrin
vineyards.classification: Vinsobres AOC, Cotes du Rhone Villages AOC, Cotes du Rhone AOC
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting room in Orange; open Monday to Saturday
vineyards.description: The Perrin family secondary label (Beaucastel owners) producing Cotes du Rhone, Cotes du Rhone Villages and Vinsobres.
vineyards.tip: La Vieille Ferme is the entry-level range; the Vinsobres Les Cornuds is a genuinely serious wine at a moderate price.

vineyards.name: Chateau d'Aqueria
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting room open at the chateau in Tavel; Monday to Saturday
vineyards.description: Tavel reference estate producing one of the most consistent and elegant Tavel roses, farming the galets plateau.

vineyards.name: Domaine de Coyeux
vineyards.classification: Muscat de Beaumes-de-Venise AOC, Cotes du Rhone Villages Beaumes-de-Venise AOC
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting room open at the domaine; weekdays and Saturday
vineyards.description: Hillside Beaumes-de-Venise domaine producing the classic Muscat VDN and a dry Grenache-Syrah red.
vineyards.tip: The Muscat VDN is luscious and aromatic, best served as an aperitif or with foie gras and tarte tatin.

vineyards.name: Domaine des Bernardins
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting room in Beaumes-de-Venise; open daily in season
vineyards.description: Traditional Beaumes-de-Venise estate long regarded as the benchmark for Muscat de Beaumes-de-Venise VDN, with old Muscat a Petits Grains vines.

vineyards.name: Domaine Le Sang des Cailloux
vineyards.tasting_program: By appointment at the domaine
vineyards.description: The most celebrated Vacqueyras estate, producing intense, mineral-driven Grenache reds that rank among the best value serious wines in the Southern Rhone.
vineyards.tip: The Vacqueyras frequently outperforms wines twice its price; production is small and it sells quickly.

vineyards.name: Chateau La Nerthe
vineyards.tasting_program: Open tasting room and shop at the chateau; cellar tours by appointment
vineyards.description: One of the oldest estates in CdP with winemaking cited to the 16th century, producing refined GSM-led reds and whites from organic farming.
vineyards.tip: The Cuvee des Cadettes white from very old Roussanne and Clairette vines is a rare and age-worthy white CdP.

vineyards.name: Domaine du Cayron
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting at the domaine by appointment
vineyards.description: Small traditional Gigondas domaine producing a single estate wine from old vines on the clay-limestone slopes at the foot of the Dentelles de Montmirail.

vineyards.name: Delas Freres
vineyards.description: Delas Freres, founded 1835 in Tain-l'Hermitage, is a leading Northern Rhone negociant producing benchmark Hermitage rouge, Les Bessards cuvee, and Saint-Joseph.
vineyards.tasting_program: By appointment at the Delas Freres cellars in Tain-l'Hermitage
vineyards.tip: The Les Bessards single-parcel Hermitage is the flagship; Saint-Joseph Sainte-Epine is excellent value.
